title: limonium mutatum
intro: Limonium mutatum, also known as the New Zealand sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Limonium mutatum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
